title: MCMICRO pipeline parameters
description: Multiplexed tissue imaging (labsyspharm/mcmicro): stitching/registration, segmentation, quantification, downstream.

input_output.title: Input / output
input_output.description: Where MCMICRO reads the project. Results are written back into the project folder, so it must be writable by you.

in.description: Project input directory (raw images + markers.csv). Browse to a folder on the NAS or in your locker.

params.description: Optional external params.yml to layer on top (advanced).

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.description: Which stages run and how the input is treated.

tma.description: Input is a tissue microarray (TMA) rather than a whole-slide image.

qc-files.description: How QC files are pulled from the work directories.

segmentation.description: Segmentation module (run several by listing them in a custom config).

segmentation-channel.description: One or more 1-based channel indices, space-separated (e.g. "1 5").

segmentation-recyze.description: Reduce the image to the segmentation channels before processing.

ilastik-model.description: Custom .ilp classifier (only when segmentation includes ilastik).

background.description: Run background subtraction and use the result downstream.

background-method.description: Which background-subtraction module to use (when background is on).

downstream.description: Downstream module (run several via a custom config).

module_options.title: Module options (advanced)
module_options.description: Extra command-line flags passed straight through to each tool.
